failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Accumulation of particulates or precipitates in the valve
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement regular maintenance and cleaning schedule for BPR valve

failure_modes.cause: Insufficient cooling or heat transfer failure
failure_modes.mitigation: Install temperature monitoring and control system with alarms

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Conduct a blockage test by introducing particulates into the system and monitoring BPR performance
Perform a thermal stability test by running the system at maximum temperature for an extended period while monitoring temperature fluctuations
